title: Lead Business Development Manager at Supertech Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Lead Business Development Manager at Supertech Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Supertech Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech Ventures Solutions:
Supertech Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
